blockingIssues.description: Added pagination coverage does not include explicit multi-page boundary tests for artifact pagination; deterministic no-skip/no-duplicate behavior for artifact pages remains unverified.
Handoff references a non-implementation docs commit and does not provide implementation SHA traceability, so the claimed portability change is not reviewable against a concrete code diff.
Derived-data pruning deletes directories based on top-level mtime age alone; active long-running build directories can be removed concurrently, violating active-directory safety.
Updated concurrent-launch rejection test is now environment-dependent and can fail when CLI executables are installed because it performs sequential launches and asserts at least one failure.
Scripts switched to `mktemp -d` under `.derived-data/*` without first ensuring the `.derived-data` parent exists, causing immediate failure on clean workspaces.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit scrutiny enforcement language that `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` must be false when required startup-read evidence entries are missing from `verification.commandsRun`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews flagged handoffs marked `followedProcedure=true` despite missing required startup-read evidence entries (e.g., misc-remote-watermark-test-warning-cleanup, misc-pagination-boundary-coverage-over-1000, misc-stabilize-switcher-working-tree-drift).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require full-SHA commit IDs and implementation SHA traceability checks as a strict gate before feature handoff acceptance, including explicit handling for no-op features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: misc-remote-watermark-test-warning-cleanup used a short commit ID and misc-fix-backfill-test-path-portability used a non-implementation artifact commit without implementation SHA traceability.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Centralize implementation-commit traceability guidance in a shared base skill/procedure instead of duplicating it across multiple worker skill files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: misc-enforce-worker-implementation-commit-traceability duplicated the same rule in five worker skills, creating maintenance drift risk.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require feature verification selectors to be validated against real XCTest class/method names when writing `verificationSteps` in mission features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: misc-fix-env-dependent-cli-launch-test-assumption initially used an incorrect `-only-testing` selector from features.json and produced a zero-tests run before correction.

rejectedObservations.observation: Feature preconditions for backfill path portability appear stale relative to current repository state.
Document pruning knob tuning (`DERIVED_DATA_PRUNE_AGE_HOURS`) in shared library guidance now.
Worker verification did not exercise clean-workspace setup for `.derived-data` existence.
